products.name: Classic Pavlova
products.description: Light and airy meringue topped with fresh whipped cream and seasonal berries. Our signature creation.
products.descriptionEs: Merengue ligero y aireado con crema batida fresca y frutas de temporada. Nuestra creación insignia.

products.name: Tres Leches Cake
products.description: Traditional Venezuelan tres leches, soaked in three types of milk and topped with whipped cream. A true classic.
products.descriptionEs: Tres leches venezolano tradicional, empapado en tres tipos de leche y cubierto con crema batida.

products.name: Strawberry Pavlova
products.description: Crisp meringue nest filled with vanilla cream and piled high with fresh strawberries and berry coulis.
products.descriptionEs: Nido de merengue crujiente relleno de crema de vainilla y fresas frescas con coulis de berries.

products.name: Cheese Bread (Pan de Queso)
products.description: Warm, freshly baked Venezuelan cheese bread. Crispy outside, soft and cheesy inside. Made fresh daily.
products.descriptionEs: Pan de queso venezolano tibio y recién horneado. Crujiente por fuera, suave y queso por dentro. Hecho fresco diariamente.

products.name: Cachapa with Queso de Mano
products.description: Traditional Venezuelan corn pancake served with handmade white cheese. Sweet, savory perfection.
products.descriptionEs: Cachapa de maíz venezolana tradicional servida con queso de mano. Dulce y salado a la perfección.

products.name: Arepa with Chicken
products.description: Freshly made corn arepa stuffed with seasoned shredded chicken, avocado and our house sauce.
products.descriptionEs: Arepa de maíz recién hecha rellena de pollo mechado sazonado, aguacate y nuestra salsa de la casa.

products.name: Espresso
products.description: Rich, perfectly extracted espresso shot. Made with premium Latin-blend coffee beans.
products.descriptionEs: Shot de espresso rico y perfectamente extraído. Hecho con granos de café blend latino premium.

products.name: Café con Leche
products.description: Strong Venezuelan-style coffee blended with warm steamed milk. The perfect morning companion.
products.descriptionEs: Café estilo venezolano fuerte mezclado con leche al vapor caliente. El acompañante perfecto por la mañana.

products.name: Milhojas — Pequeña
products.description: Deliciosas capas de crocante hojaldre y suave crema pastelera .
products.descriptionEs: Deliciosas capas de crocante hojaldre y suave crema pastelera .

products.name: Milhojas profiterol — grande
products.description: Deliciosa milhojas con profiteroles rellenos de suave crema pastelera, cobertura espesa de chocolate y topping de nutella
products.descriptionEs: Deliciosa milhojas con profiteroles rellenos de suave crema pastelera, cobertura espesa de chocolate y topping de nutella

products.name: Pavlova grande — Kiwi
products.description: Rellenos nutella, Dulce de leche , mitad nutella mitad dulce de leche
products.descriptionEs: Rellenos nutella, Dulce de leche , mitad nutella mitad dulce de leche

products.description:
Los shots se venden a partir de 24 unidades, 
No menos de 6 por sabor
products.descriptionEs:
Los shots se venden a partir de 24 unidades,

products.nameEs: Torta de piña — Pequeña para 10/12 porciones

menu_items.descriptionEs: Cachapa de maíz venezolana con queso de mano artesanal

menu_items.descriptionEs: Arepa crujiente rellena de carne mechada, caraotas negras, tajadas y queso blanco

menu_items.name: Cheese Bread (3 pcs)
menu_items.description: Warm, freshly baked cheese bread — made fresh every morning
menu_items.descriptionEs: Pan de queso tibio y recién horneado — hecho fresco cada mañana

menu_items.description: Venezuelan-style chicken and rice with herbs, vegetables and sofrito. A comforting classic.
menu_items.descriptionEs: Arroz con pollo estilo venezolano con hierbas, vegetales y sofrito. Un clásico reconfortante.

menu_items.name: Pabellón Criollo
menu_items.description: The Venezuelan national dish: shredded beef, black beans, white rice, sweet plantains and cheese
menu_items.descriptionEs: El plato nacional venezolano: carne mechada, caraotas, arroz blanco, tajadas y queso

menu_items.descriptionEs: Empanadas de maíz crujientes con relleno a elegir: queso, carne o pollo

menu_items.name: Classic Pavlova
menu_items.description: Light meringue topped with fresh whipped cream and seasonal berries — our signature dessert
menu_items.descriptionEs: Merengue ligero con crema batida fresca y frutas de temporada — nuestro postre insignia

menu_items.description: Classic Venezuelan tres leches cake slice. Moist, creamy, and irresistible.
menu_items.descriptionEs: Rebanada de torta tres leches venezolana clásica. Húmeda, cremosa e irresistible.

menu_items.name: Cheese Flan
menu_items.description: Traditional Venezuelan quesillo — silky smooth caramel flan with cream cheese
menu_items.descriptionEs: Quesillo venezolano tradicional — flan de caramelo sedoso con queso crema

reviews.text: The pavlovas here are absolutely stunning — I drove all the way from St. Pete and it was worth every mile. The meringue was perfectly crisp outside, cloud-soft inside. This place is a hidden gem in Tampa.
Incredible Venezuelan flavors! The arepas, the cachapas, the homemade bread — everything tastes like it was made with love. My abuela would approve. We come every week.
We ordered a custom birthday cake and it was beyond beautiful. The team was so thoughtful and the flavors were incredible. Everyone at the party asked where it came from. Will 100% be ordering again.
Best coffee and pastries in Tampa hands down. The cheese bread, the pandebono, the espresso — this is my new morning ritual. Warm, welcoming, and consistently excellent.
I catered my corporate event with Pavlova Love and they knocked it out of the park. Professional, on time, and the dessert table was a showstopper. Multiple colleagues asked for their info.
The daily menu changes and it's always something special. Today I had the most incredible arroz con pollo. Homemade, flavorful, generous portions. This place has soul.
Found them on Instagram and I'm so glad I did. The food photography does not lie — it looks as good as it tastes. The pavlova with fresh berries is a masterpiece.

site_settings.taglineEs: Con raíces venezolanas. Cocina latina. Hecho con amor.
site_settings.announcementBanner: Now accepting catering orders for summer events! Call or message us.
site_settings.announcementBannerEs: ¡Ahora tomando pedidos de catering para eventos de verano! Llámanos.
site_settings.metaDescription: Pavlova Love Tampa — Venezuelan bakery, café and Latin kitchen in Tampa, FL. Handcrafted desserts, daily Latin menu, custom cakes, and catering.
site_settings.metaDescriptionEs: Pavlova Love Tampa — Panadería venezolana, café y cocina latina en Tampa, FL. Postres artesanales, menú latino diario, tortas personalizadas y catering.
